hyperedges.label: Two-Stage LLM Pipeline: Ingest → Extract → Synthesize
Anti-Hallucination Mechanism: temperature=0 + two-stage + schema coercion
Multi-Provider LLM Strategy: OpenRouter / Anthropic / Gemini / Fake

nodes.label: Two-stage Extract+Synthesize Anti-Hallucination Design
nodes.rationale: Separating extraction from synthesis prevents hallucinations: extraction produces only facts tied to sources, synthesis assembles the document strictly from those facts. Fields without supporting facts remain empty rather than fabricated. temperature=0 enforces determinism.

nodes.label: File-hash-based Fact Cache Design
nodes.rationale: Facts are cached per-file by MD5 hash of content to save LLM tokens on repeated runs. Cache miss triggers LLM extraction; cache hit loads facts directly.

nodes.label: Strict Schema Coercion Anti-Hallucination Layer
nodes.rationale: coerce_document() provides a hard type-safety layer after LLM output: unknown keys are dropped, mistyped fields are coerced, None becomes empty, lists are deduplicated. Guards against structural hallucinations even when the model drifts from the requested format.

nodes.label: Timeline Conflict: 8 weeks vs 10 weeks
nodes.rationale: project_brief.md states 8-week development phase; meeting_notes.md proposes extension to 10 weeks due to onboarding delays. This is a factual conflict the synthesis LLM must resolve with justification in resolution_notes.

nodes.label: Budget Conflict: $150k vs $120k
nodes.rationale: budget.json shows $150,000 total; meeting_notes.md suggests alternative $120,000 cap for steering committee. Represents a real cross-source conflict the pipeline must detect and expose.
